title: Mapo Tofu
summary: Spicy and numbing Sichuan stir-fry with soft tofu and fermented chili bean paste.
instructions: Simmer doubanjiang and chili flakes in oil until fragrant. Add silken tofu, soy sauce, and a touch of sugar, then thicken with cornstarch slurry. Garnish with Sichuan peppercorns.

title: Kung Pao Cauliflower
summary: A vegetarian take on the classic Kung Pao, featuring crispy cauliflower florets in a savory, spicy sauce.
instructions: Deep-fry or roast cauliflower until tender-crisp. Stir-fry cauliflower with peanuts, dried chilies, and scallions in a sweet and savory sauce. Serve immediately.

title: Dan Dan Noodles (Vegan)
summary: Chewy noodles coated in a rich, spicy sauce made from sesame paste, chili oil, and savory 'meat' crumbles.
instructions: Cook noodles and set aside. Whisk together sesame paste, soy sauce, chili oil, black vinegar, and a touch of sugar. Toss noodles with sauce and top with sautéed mushrooms or plant-based mince.

title: Stir-Fried Greens with Garlic
summary: A simple yet flavorful dish of quickly stir-fried leafy greens, infused with aromatic garlic.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok and sauté minced garlic until fragrant. Add leafy greens and stir-fry until wilted. Season with soy sauce or salt.

title: Vegetable Chow Mein
summary: Noodles stir-fried with a colorful assortment of vegetables in a savory sauce.
instructions: Boil noodles until al dente, drain, and toss with a little oil. Stir-fry mixed vegetables until tender-crisp. Add noodles and a sauce made of soy sauce, oyster sauce (or vegetarian alternative), and sesame oil. Toss to combine.

title: Scallion Pancakes
summary: Crispy, chewy, and savory pan-fried flatbreads studded with fresh scallions.
instructions: Mix flour and water to form a dough, rest, then roll thin. Sprinkle with oil, salt, and chopped scallions, roll up, and coil into a spiral. Flatten again and pan-fry until golden brown and crispy.

title: Egg Drop Soup
summary: A light and comforting broth with delicate ribbons of whisked egg.
instructions: Bring chicken or vegetable broth to a simmer. Slowly drizzle in whisked eggs while stirring to create ribbons. Season with salt, white pepper, and a dash of sesame oil.

title: Dry-Fried Green Beans
summary: Crispy and slightly charred green beans tossed with chili and garlic for a flavorful side dish.
instructions: Stir-fry green beans in hot oil until blistered and tender-crisp. Add garlic, chili flakes, and a splash of soy sauce, tossing to coat. Serve immediately.

title: Braised Eggplant
summary: Tender eggplant slow-cooked in a savory garlic and soy sauce mixture.
instructions: Pan-fry or deep-fry eggplant pieces until golden and softened. Simmer eggplant with garlic, ginger, soy sauce, and a touch of sugar in a flavorful broth. Finish with sesame oil.

title: Mala Mushrooms
summary: A fiery and numbing stir-fry featuring assorted mushrooms coated in spicy Sichuan peppercorn and chili sauce.
instructions: Stir-fry assorted mushrooms until browned. Add Sichuan peppercorns, chili flakes, garlic, ginger, soy sauce, and a touch of sugar. Cook until fragrant and well combined.

title: Vegan Zha Jiang Mian
summary: Noodles topped with a rich, savory sauce made from fermented black beans and finely minced mushrooms.
instructions: Sauté minced mushrooms until dry. Add fermented black beans, garlic, ginger, soy sauce, and a touch of sugar, cooking until fragrant. Serve over noodles with cucumber and carrot.

title: Sweet and Sour Broccoli
summary: Crisp-tender broccoli florets coated in a tangy, sweet, and savory sauce.
instructions: Blanch broccoli until bright green. Prepare a sauce with ketchup, vinegar, sugar, soy sauce, and cornstarch. Stir-fry broccoli with the sauce until thickened and glossy.

title: Chicken Parmesan
summary: Breaded and fried chicken topped with marinara sauce and melted mozzarella cheese
instructions: Pound chicken breasts to an even thickness and bread with flour, eggs, and breadcrumbs Fry chicken in olive oil until golden brown and top with marinara sauce and mozzarella cheese Bake in the oven until cheese is melted and bubbly

title: Seafood Linguine
summary: Linguine pasta tossed with mixed seafood, garlic, and white wine
instructions: Cook linguine pasta according to package directions Saute mixed seafood, garlic, and white wine in olive oil until seafood is cooked through Toss cooked linguine with seafood mixture and serve

title: Italian Sausage Pasta
summary: Spicy Italian sausage and tomato sauce served over penne pasta
instructions: Cook penne pasta according to package directions Cook Italian sausage in olive oil until browned, then add tomato sauce and simmer Toss cooked penne pasta with sausage and tomato sauce mixture

title: Chicken Marsala
summary: Chicken breasts cooked in a Marsala wine and mushroom sauce
instructions: Pound chicken breasts to an even thickness and season with salt and pepper Cook chicken in olive oil until browned, then add Marsala wine and mushrooms Simmer sauce until reduced and serve over chicken

title: Meatball Sub
summary: Juicy meatballs served in a sub roll with marinara sauce and melted mozzarella cheese
instructions: Mix ground beef with breadcrumbs, eggs, and seasonings to form meatballs Cook meatballs in olive oil until browned, then add marinara sauce and simmer Serve meatballs in sub rolls with melted mozzarella cheese

title: Shrimp Scampi
summary: Shrimp sauteed in garlic butter and white wine, served with linguine pasta
instructions: Cook linguine pasta according to package directions Saute shrimp in garlic butter until pink and cooked through Add white wine and cook until reduced, serving over linguine pasta

title: Chicken Cacciatore
summary: Chicken and mushrooms cooked in a tomato-based sauce, served with pasta
instructions: Cook chicken in olive oil until browned, then add mushrooms and cook until tender Add tomato sauce and simmer until sauce is thickened Serve over cooked pasta

title: Beef Braciole
summary: Thinly sliced beef rolled with prosciutto and parmesan cheese, braised in tomato sauce
instructions: Pound beef slices to an even thickness and layer with prosciutto and parmesan cheese Roll beef slices and tie with kitchen twine Braise in tomato sauce until tender, serving with cooked pasta

title: Lamb Chops
summary: Grilled lamb chops seasoned with herbs and garlic, served with roasted vegetables
instructions: Season lamb chops with salt, pepper, and herbs Grill lamb chops until browned and cooked to desired doneness Serve with roasted vegetables

title: Pork Tenderloin
summary: Roasted pork tenderloin seasoned with herbs and garlic, served with roasted potatoes
instructions: Season pork tenderloin with salt, pepper, and herbs Roast pork tenderloin in the oven until cooked to desired doneness Serve with roasted potatoes

title: Chicken Florentine
summary: Chicken breasts cooked in a creamy spinach sauce, served with fettuccine pasta
instructions: Cook fettuccine pasta according to package directions Cook chicken in olive oil until browned, then add spinach and cream Simmer sauce until thickened, serving over fettuccine pasta

title: Stir-Fried Bok Choy with Ginger
summary: Tender bok choy is quickly stir-fried with aromatic ginger for a simple and healthy side dish.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add minced ginger and stir-fry until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Add bok choy and stir-fry until crisp-tender, about 3-5 minutes. Season with soy sauce and a pinch of sugar (optional) before serving.

title: Braised Shiitake Mushrooms
summary: Dried shiitake mushrooms are rehydrated and braised in a savory sauce until tender and flavorful.
instructions: Soak dried shiitake mushrooms in hot water for at least 30 minutes, then drain, reserving liquid. Sauté ginger and garlic in oil until fragrant. Add mushrooms, soy sauce, vegetarian oyster sauce (optional), sugar, and a splash of reserved mushroom liquid. Simmer covered for 15-20 minutes until mushrooms are tender and sauce has thickened.

title: Vegetarian Dumplings
summary: Handmade dumplings filled with a savory mixture of vegetables and tofu, pan-fried or steamed.
instructions: Combine finely chopped napa cabbage, shiitake mushrooms, carrots, firm tofu, ginger, garlic, soy sauce, sesame oil, and white pepper. Fill dumpling wrappers with the mixture, pleating to seal. Pan-fry dumplings in oil until bottoms are golden brown, then add water and steam until cooked through, or steam directly. Serve with a dipping sauce of soy sauce, vinegar, and chili oil.

title: Stir-Fried Lotus Root
summary: Crispy and slightly sweet lotus root is stir-fried with a light sauce for a refreshing dish.
instructions: Slice lotus root thinly and soak in water with a little vinegar to prevent browning. Stir-fry lotus root in hot oil for a few minutes until slightly tender-crisp. Add garlic, ginger, soy sauce, and a pinch of sugar. Stir-fry for another minute until coated and fragrant.

title: Spicy Cucumber Salad
summary: Refreshing cucumbers are smashed and tossed with a spicy, tangy dressing.
instructions: Smash cucumbers with the side of a knife, then chop into bite-sized pieces. Drain excess water from the cucumbers. Toss cucumbers with garlic, soy sauce, black vinegar, sesame oil, sugar, and chili flakes. Let sit for 10 minutes before serving.

title: Stir-Fried Enoki Mushrooms
summary: Delicate enoki mushrooms are quickly stir-fried with garlic and seasonings.
instructions: Trim the base of the enoki mushrooms and separate the strands. Heat oil in a wok and stir-fry minced garlic until fragrant. Add enoki mushrooms and stir-fry until just wilted. Season with soy sauce, a pinch of white pepper, and optionally vegetarian oyster sauce.

title: Stir-Fried Spinach with Fermented Tofu
summary: Spinach is stir-fried with the unique umami flavor of fermented tofu.
instructions: Wash spinach thoroughly. Mash fermented tofu with a fork. Heat oil in a wok, add fermented tofu and stir-fry briefly. Add spinach and stir-fry until wilted, season with a little sugar if desired.

title: Stir-Fried Celery with Peanuts
summary: Crunchy celery is stir-fried with toasted peanuts and a light savory sauce.
instructions: Slice celery thinly on an angle. Heat oil in a wok, stir-fry garlic and ginger until fragrant. Add celery and stir-fry until crisp-tender. Stir in soy sauce, a pinch of sugar, and roasted peanuts, cooking for another minute.

title: Stir-Fried Water Chestnuts and Bamboo Shoots
summary: A simple stir-fry featuring the crisp textures of water chestnuts and bamboo shoots.
instructions: Drain and rinse sliced water chestnuts and bamboo shoots. Heat oil in a wok and stir-fry garlic and ginger until fragrant. Add water chestnuts and bamboo shoots, stir-frying for 2-3 minutes. Season with soy sauce and a pinch of white pepper.

title: Stir-Fried Eggplant with Garlic Sauce
summary: Tender chunks of eggplant are stir-fried and coated in a rich garlic and soy sauce.
instructions: Cut eggplant into bite-sized pieces and soak in salted water for 10 minutes, then drain and pat dry. Stir-fry eggplant in hot oil until softened and lightly browned. Remove eggplant and set aside. Stir-fry minced garlic and ginger in the same wok, then add soy sauce, vegetarian oyster sauce, and a splash of water. Return eggplant to the wok and toss to coat in the sauce.

title: Vegetarian Lion's Head Meatballs
summary: Tender vegetarian 'meatballs' made from tofu and vegetables, simmered in a savory broth with bok choy.
instructions: Combine mashed firm tofu, chopped mushrooms, water chestnuts, ginger, scallions, soy sauce, and cornstarch. Form into large balls and pan-fry until golden brown. Simmer meatballs in vegetable broth with soy sauce and vegetarian oyster sauce for 20 minutes. Add bok choy during the last 5 minutes of simmering.

title: Crispy Fried Tofu with Chili Salt
summary: Cubed tofu is fried until crispy and tossed with a savory and slightly spicy chili salt mixture.
instructions: Press firm tofu to remove excess water, then cut into cubes. Fry tofu in hot oil until golden brown and crispy, then drain. In a bowl, mix salt, chili powder, Sichuan peppercorn powder (optional), and a pinch of sugar. Toss the fried tofu with the chili salt mixture.

title: Greek Lamb Kebab
summary: Tender chunks of marinated lamb grilled to perfection and served with a fresh tzatziki sauce.
instructions: Marinate lamb chunks in olive oil, lemon juice, oregano, salt, and pepper for at least 30 minutes. Thread onto skewers and grill until cooked through, about 8-10 minutes per side. Serve with tzatziki sauce.

title: Shrimp Saganaki
summary: Succulent shrimp baked in a rich tomato sauce with feta cheese and herbs.
instructions: Sauté shrimp with garlic and onions, then add diced tomatoes, white wine, and herbs. Simmer until shrimp are cooked, then top with feta cheese and bake until golden. Serve hot.

title: Chicken Souvlaki
summary: Marinated chicken skewers grilled until juicy and slightly charred.
instructions: Marinate chicken pieces in lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, and herbs. Thread onto skewers and grill or broil until cooked through. Serve with lemon wedges.

title: Moussaka
summary: A classic Greek layered casserole with eggplant, spiced meat sauce, and a creamy béchamel topping.
instructions: Layer fried eggplant slices with a spiced lamb and tomato sauce, then top with a béchamel sauce. Bake until golden brown and bubbly. Allow to rest before serving.

title: Baked Cod with Tomatoes and Olives
summary: Flaky cod fillets baked with Mediterranean flavors of tomatoes, olives, and herbs.
instructions: Place cod fillets in a baking dish. Top with cherry tomatoes, olives, garlic, olive oil, and herbs. Bake until the fish is opaque and flakes easily. Serve immediately.

title: Lamb Tagine
summary: A slow-cooked Moroccan stew featuring tender lamb, sweet apricots, and aromatic spices.
instructions: Sear lamb pieces, then simmer with onions, garlic, ginger, spices, broth, and dried apricots until lamb is very tender. Serve hot, often with couscous.

title: Grilled Halloumi with Pork
summary: Salty grilled halloumi cheese paired with seasoned grilled pork tenderloin slices.
instructions: Season pork tenderloin and grill until cooked through, then slice. Grill halloumi slices until golden brown and slightly softened. Serve the pork with grilled halloumi.

title: Chicken Gyros
summary: Marinated chicken cooked and thinly sliced, served in warm pita bread with toppings.
instructions: Marinate thinly sliced chicken breast with olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, and Greek spices. Cook the chicken until browned. Serve in warm pita bread with lettuce, tomato, onion, and tzatziki.

title: Spicy Lamb Kofta
summary: Spiced ground lamb meatballs, grilled or pan-fried, with a hint of heat.
instructions: Mix ground lamb with finely chopped onion, garlic, parsley, cumin, coriander, chili flakes, salt, and pepper. Form into small meatballs (kofta) and grill or pan-fry until browned and cooked through. Serve with yogurt or a salad.

title: Barramundi with Lemon Caper Sauce
summary: Pan-seared barramundi fillets served with a bright and tangy lemon-caper sauce.
instructions: Season barramundi fillets and pan-sear in olive oil until golden and cooked through. Remove fish and make a sauce in the same pan with butter, lemon juice, capers, and white wine. Pour sauce over fish.

title: Beef Kebabs with Vegetables
summary: Marinated beef cubes threaded onto skewers with colorful vegetables and grilled.
instructions: Marinate beef cubes in olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, and herbs. Thread beef onto skewers alternating with chunks of bell pepper, onion, and zucchini. Grill until beef is cooked to your liking.

title: Chorizo and Chickpea Stew
summary: A hearty Spanish-inspired stew with spicy chorizo, chickpeas, tomatoes, and spinach.
instructions: Sauté diced chorizo, then add onion and garlic. Stir in diced tomatoes, chickpeas, broth, and spices, simmering until flavors meld. Wilt in spinach just before serving.

title: Ratatouille
summary: A classic Provençal stewed vegetable dish featuring eggplant, zucchini, tomatoes, and bell peppers.
instructions: Sauté sliced onions and garlic in olive oil. Add sliced zucchini, eggplant, bell peppers, and tomatoes, seasoning with herbs. Simmer until vegetables are tender and flavors meld.

title: Vegan French Onion Soup
summary: A rich and savory vegan take on the classic French onion soup, featuring caramelized onions in a flavorful broth topped with toasted bread and vegan cheese.
instructions: Slowly caramelize thinly sliced onions in butter or oil until deeply browned. Deglaze with brandy or wine, then add vegetable broth and simmer. Serve hot, topped with crusty bread and melted vegan cheese.

title: Vegan Spinach Artichoke Dip
summary: A creamy and flavorful plant-based dip perfect for sharing, made with artichoke hearts, spinach, and a cashew cream base.
instructions: Blend soaked cashews with nutritional yeast, lemon juice, garlic, and plant milk until smooth and creamy. Stir in chopped spinach and artichoke hearts. Bake until bubbly and golden.

title: Vegan Lentil Shepherd's Pie
summary: A hearty and comforting vegan twist on Shepherd's Pie, featuring a rich lentil and vegetable filling topped with creamy mashed potatoes.
instructions: Sauté mirepoix (onion, carrot, celery) and garlic. Add brown lentils, vegetable broth, tomato paste, and herbs; simmer until lentils are tender. Top with mashed potatoes (made with plant milk and vegan butter) and bake until golden.

title: Vegan Mushroom Risotto
summary: A creamy and decadent risotto made with Arborio rice, mushrooms, and nutritional yeast for a cheesy flavor without dairy.
instructions: Sauté mushrooms and onions in olive oil. Add Arborio rice and toast lightly, then gradually add warm vegetable broth, stirring constantly until creamy. Stir in nutritional yeast and herbs.

title: Vegan Potato Pancakes (Kartoffelpuffer)
summary: Crispy on the outside, tender on the inside vegan potato pancakes, perfect as a side dish or a light meal.
instructions: Grate potatoes and onion, squeeze out excess moisture. Mix with flour, baking powder, and plant milk to form a batter. Pan-fry spoonfuls in hot oil until golden brown and crispy.

title: Vegan Spanish Chickpea Stew
summary: A robust and flavorful vegan stew with chickpeas, spinach, tomatoes, and smoky paprika.
instructions: Sauté onion, garlic, and bell pepper. Add canned tomatoes, chickpeas, vegetable broth, smoked paprika, and cumin; simmer until thickened. Stir in spinach until wilted.

title: Vegan Italian White Bean Soup
summary: A comforting and hearty soup with cannellini beans, vegetables, and herbs in a savory broth.
instructions: Sauté onion, carrot, celery, and garlic in olive oil. Add cannellini beans, vegetable broth, diced tomatoes, and Italian herbs; simmer until vegetables are tender. Blend a portion of the soup for creaminess if desired.

title: Vegan Mushroom Pierogi
summary: Delicate vegan dumplings filled with savory sautéed mushrooms and onions.
instructions: Prepare a simple vegan dough and let it rest. Sauté finely chopped mushrooms and onions until browned and moisture has evaporated. Roll out dough, cut circles, fill with mushroom mixture, seal, and boil until they float.

title: Vegan Lentil 'Sausage' Stew
summary: A hearty and flavorful stew inspired by German cuisine, featuring lentils, root vegetables, and plant-based sausage.
instructions: Sauté chopped onion, carrots, and celery. Add brown lentils, vegetable broth, diced potatoes, and vegan sausage; simmer until lentils and vegetables are tender. Season with marjoram and bay leaf.

title: Vegan Swiss Chard and Potato Gratin
summary: A comforting and elegant baked dish featuring layers of thinly sliced potatoes and wilted Swiss chard in a creamy vegan sauce.
instructions: Sauté garlic and Swiss chard until wilted. Prepare a cashew-based béchamel sauce. Layer thinly sliced potatoes and Swiss chard in a baking dish, pour sauce over, and bake until tender and bubbly.

title: Vegan Creamy Mushroom Soup
summary: A rich and velvety mushroom soup made creamy with blended cashews or plant-based cream.
instructions: Sauté mushrooms, onions, and garlic until softened and browned. Add vegetable broth and simmer. Blend with soaked cashews (or plant-based cream) until smooth. Season and reheat gently.

title: Classic Apple Pie
summary: A quintessential American dessert featuring a flaky crust filled with tender, spiced apples.
instructions: Prepare your favorite double pie crust and chill. Toss sliced apples with sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, and a touch of flour. Fill the bottom crust with the apple mixture, dot with butter, and top with the second crust, crimping and venting. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 20 minutes, then reduce heat to 375°F (190°C) and bake for another 30-40 minutes, until crust is golden and filling is bubbly.

title: BBQ Pulled Pork Sandwich
summary: Slow-cooked pork shoulder shredded and tossed in tangy barbecue sauce, served on a bun.
instructions: Slow cook a pork shoulder until easily shreddable. Shred the pork and mix with your favorite barbecue sauce. Serve generously on toasted hamburger buns.

title: New England Clam Chowder
summary: A creamy, rich chowder brimming with clams and potatoes.
instructions: Sauté bacon and onions in a large pot, then add potatoes and clam juice. Simmer until potatoes are tender, then add chopped clams and cook for a few minutes. Stir in milk and heavy cream, heat gently without boiling, and season with salt and pepper.

title: Texas Chili
summary: A hearty, spicy chili made with beef and chili peppers, without beans.
instructions: Brown cubed beef with onions and garlic in a large pot. Add chili powder, cumin, and other spices, then stir in tomatoes and beef broth. Simmer for at least 2 hours until the beef is tender and the sauce has thickened.

title: Philly Cheesesteak
summary: Thinly sliced ribeye steak sautéed with onions and topped with melted cheese, served in a long roll.
instructions: Thinly slice ribeye steak and sauté with sliced onions until browned. Transfer steak and onions to a long roll, top with your favorite cheese (provolone or cheese whiz), and melt. Serve immediately.

title: Fried Chicken
summary: Crispy, golden-brown chicken pieces coated in seasoned flour and deep-fried to perfection.
instructions: Cut chicken into serving pieces and season with salt and pepper. Dredge chicken in a seasoned flour mixture. Fry in hot oil until golden brown and cooked through.

title: Boston Baked Beans
summary: Slow-cooked navy beans with molasses and salt pork for a sweet and savory side dish.
instructions: Soak navy beans overnight, then drain and rinse. Combine beans with molasses, mustard, and salt pork in a baking dish. Bake at a low temperature for several hours until tender and caramelized.

title: Beef Stew
summary: Tender chunks of beef simmered with vegetables in a rich, savory broth.
instructions: Brown beef cubes in a Dutch oven, then add chopped onions and garlic. Stir in flour, then add beef broth, diced tomatoes, and herbs. Add carrots and potatoes, then simmer covered for 2-3 hours until beef and vegetables are tender.

title: Chicken Noodle Soup
summary: A comforting classic soup with chicken, noodles, and vegetables in a savory broth.
instructions: Simmer chicken in water with carrots, celery, and onion until cooked; remove chicken and shred. Add noodles to the broth and cook until tender. Return shredded chicken to the pot, season with salt and pepper, and serve hot.

title: Lobster Bisque
summary: A luxurious, creamy soup made with lobster meat and rich seafood stock.
instructions: Sauté mirepoix (onion, celery, carrot) in butter, then add lobster bodies and tomato paste. Deglaze with brandy, add seafood stock, and simmer; strain the broth. Add lobster meat, cream, and seasonings, then heat gently before serving.

title: Buffalo Wings
summary: Crispy fried chicken wings tossed in a spicy, tangy sauce, a classic bar food.
instructions: Fry chicken wings until crispy and cooked through. Melt butter and whisk in hot sauce and vinegar to make the sauce. Toss the fried wings in the sauce and serve immediately with blue cheese dressing and celery sticks.

title: Deviled Eggs
summary: Hard-boiled eggs, halved and filled with a creamy, seasoned yolk mixture.
instructions: Boil eggs until hard, peel, and slice in half lengthwise, removing yolks. Mash yolks with mayonnaise, mustard, and seasonings. Spoon or pipe the yolk mixture back into the egg white halves and garnish.

title: Spaghetti Carbonara
summary: A classic Roman pasta dish with eggs, hard cheese, cured pork, and black pepper.
instructions: Cook spaghetti until al dente. In a bowl, whisk eggs, Pecorino Romano, and black pepper. Sauté guanciale until crisp, then toss with pasta, egg mixture, and a splash of pasta water.

title: Lasagna al Forno
summary: Layers of pasta, rich meat sauce (ragù), béchamel, and cheese baked until golden.
instructions: Prepare a rich ragù with ground beef and pork. Assemble layers of lasagna sheets, ragù, béchamel sauce, and Parmigiano Reggiano. Bake until bubbling and golden brown.

title: Risotto alla Milanese
summary: Creamy saffron-infused risotto, often served with osso buco.
instructions: Sauté Arborio rice with onion and add saffron-infused broth. Stir frequently until creamy and al dente. Finish with butter and Parmigiano Reggiano.

title: Osso Buco
summary: Braised veal shanks cooked with vegetables, white wine, and broth until tender.
instructions: Sear veal shanks and sauté mirepoix. Deglaze with white wine, add broth, and braise until tender. Serve garnished with gremolata.

title: Bistecca alla Fiorentina
summary: A thick-cut T-bone or porterhouse steak, grilled rare and seasoned simply.
instructions: Grill a thick-cut porterhouse steak over high heat. Season with salt and pepper. Serve immediately.

title: Fettuccine Alfredo
summary: Fettuccine pasta coated in a rich sauce of butter, heavy cream, and Parmesan cheese.
instructions: Cook fettuccine pasta. Melt butter, stir in heavy cream, and gradually add Parmesan cheese. Toss pasta with sauce and optional grilled chicken.

title: Saltimbocca
summary: Veal cutlets topped with prosciutto and sage, pan-fried.
instructions: Top veal cutlets with prosciutto and sage leaves. Pan-fry until golden and cooked through. Deglaze pan with white wine and butter for sauce.

title: Arancini
summary: Fried risotto balls, often filled with ragù, mozzarella, or peas.
instructions: Form cold risotto into balls, adding a filling like ragù. Coat balls in flour, egg, and breadcrumbs. Deep-fry until golden brown and crisp.

title: Linguine alle Vongole
summary: Linguine pasta with fresh clams, garlic, white wine, and parsley.
instructions: Sauté garlic in olive oil, add clams and white wine, cook until opened. Cook linguine separately. Toss pasta with clam sauce and fresh parsley.

title: Pizza Margherita
summary: Simple Neapolitan pizza with tomatoes, mozzarella, fresh basil, salt, and olive oil.
instructions: Stretch pizza dough and top with tomato sauce. Arrange mozzarella slices and basil leaves, drizzle with olive oil. Bake in a very hot oven until crust is golden and cheese is bubbly.

title: Cannelloni
summary: Pasta tubes filled with ricotta and spinach, baked in tomato sauce and béchamel.
instructions: Prepare a filling of ricotta, spinach, and ground meat. Stuff cannelloni tubes and arrange in a baking dish. Cover with tomato sauce and béchamel, bake until bubbly.

title: Tagliatelle al Ragù
summary: Fresh tagliatelle pasta served with a slow-cooked Bolognese meat sauce.
instructions: Simmer a rich ragù of ground beef, pork, and vegetables for several hours. Cook fresh tagliatelle until al dente. Toss pasta with the ragù and serve with Parmigiano Reggiano.

title: Braised Tofu with Mushrooms
summary: Braised tofu with mushrooms in a savory Chinese sauce.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok and stir-fry the mushrooms, then add the tofu and sauce. Braise the mixture for 10 minutes, then serve. Garnish with green onions.

title: Spicy Vegan Wontons
summary: Crispy vegan wontons filled with a spicy tofu mixture.
instructions: Fill wonton wrappers with the tofu mixture, then fry until crispy. Serve with a side of soy sauce and chili oil. Be careful when working with hot oil.

title: Steamed Vegetable Dumplings
summary: Delicate dumplings filled with a mixture of sautéed vegetables and tofu.
instructions: Steam the dumplings for 10-12 minutes, then serve with a side of soy sauce. Make sure the dumplings are sealed properly to prevent filling from escaping during steaming.

title: Stir-Fried Vegetables with Tofu
summary: Quick and easy stir-fry made with a variety of colorful vegetables and crispy tofu.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok and stir-fry the vegetables and tofu, then season with soy sauce. Stir-fry quickly to preserve the color and texture of the vegetables.

title: Vegan Vegetable Spring Rolls
summary: Crispy spring rolls filled with a colorful mixture of shredded vegetables.
instructions: Fill spring roll wrappers with the vegetable mixture, then fry until crispy. Serve with a side of sweet chili sauce.

title: Braised Seitan with Vegetables
summary: Hearty and flavorful braise made with seitan and a variety of colorful vegetables.
instructions: Braise the seitan and vegetables in a savory sauce for 30 minutes, then serve. Use a slow cooker for a convenient and hands-off cooking experience.

title: Stir-Fried Mushrooms with Bok Choy
summary: Quick and easy stir-fry made with a variety of mushrooms and delicate bok choy.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok and stir-fry the mushrooms and bok choy, then season with soy sauce. Stir-fry quickly to preserve the color and texture of the vegetables.

title: Vegan Tofu and Vegetable Skewers
summary: Colorful skewers made with marinated tofu and a variety of vegetables.
instructions: Alternate tofu and vegetables on skewers, then brush with soy sauce and grill or bake. Serve with a side of quinoa or brown rice.

title: Steamed Tofu with Vegetables
summary: Delicate and flavorful dish made with steamed tofu and a variety of colorful vegetables.
instructions: Steam the tofu and vegetables for 10-12 minutes, then serve with a side of soy sauce. Use a steamer basket for easy and convenient steaming.

title: Vegan Eggplant in Garlic Sauce
summary: Rich and savory sauce made with roasted eggplant and a variety of aromatics.
instructions: Roast the eggplant in the oven, then blend with garlic and soy sauce. Serve with steamed rice or noodles.

title: Stir-Fried Noodles with Vegetables
summary: Quick and easy stir-fry made with a variety of colorful vegetables and noodles.
instructions: Cook the noodles according to package instructions, then stir-fry with the vegetables and soy sauce. Stir-fry quickly to preserve the color and texture of the vegetables.

title: Braised Lentils with Vegetables
summary: Hearty and flavorful braise made with lentils and a variety of colorful vegetables.
instructions: Braise the lentils and vegetables in a savory sauce for 30 minutes, then serve. Use a slow cooker for a convenient and hands-off cooking experience.

title: Thai Chicken Curry
summary: A delicious and spicy Thai curry made with chicken, coconut milk, and a blend of aromatic spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a pan and sauté the onion and garlic until softened. Add the chicken and cook until browned, then add the curry paste and cook for 1 minute. Pour in the coconut milk and simmer until the sauce thickens.

title: Grilled Pork Satay
summary: A classic Thai dish of marinated pork skewers, grilled to perfection and served with a side of peanut sauce.
instructions: Thread the pork onto skewers and grill until cooked through. Serve with a side of peanut sauce for dipping. Garnish with chopped cilantro and toasted peanuts.

title: Tom Yum Soup with Shrimp
summary: A spicy and sour Thai soup made with shrimp, lemongrass, and a variety of aromatic spices.
instructions: Combine the stock, lemongrass, and spices in a pot and bring to a boil. Add the shrimp and cook until pink and fully cooked. Stir in the lime juice and fish sauce, and serve hot.

title: Thai Beef Salad
summary: A spicy and sour Thai salad made with grilled beef, herbs, and a variety of aromatic spices.
instructions: Grill the beef until cooked through, then slice into thin strips. Combine the beef, herbs, and spices in a bowl and toss to combine. Serve immediately, garnished with toasted peanuts and lime wedges.

title: Massaman Curry with Lamb
summary: A rich and flavorful Thai curry made with lamb, potatoes, and a blend of aromatic spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a pan and sauté the onion and garlic until softened. Add the lamb and cook until browned, then add the curry paste and cook for 1 minute. Pour in the coconut milk and simmer until the sauce thickens.

title: Thai Fish Cakes
summary: A crispy and flavorful Thai snack made with fish, red curry paste, and green beans.
instructions: Combine the fish, curry paste, and green beans in a bowl and mix well. Shape into patties and fry until crispy and golden brown. Serve with a side of sweet chili sauce.

title: Green Curry with Chicken and Eggplant
summary: A creamy and flavorful Thai curry made with chicken, eggplant, and a blend of aromatic spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a pan and sauté the onion and garlic until softened. Add the chicken and cook until browned, then add the curry paste and cook for 1 minute. Pour in the coconut milk and simmer until the sauce thickens.

title: Thai Pork and Vegetable Stir-Fry
summary: A quick and easy Thai stir-fry made with pork, mixed vegetables, and a blend of aromatic spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a pan and sauté the onion and garlic until softened. Add the pork and cook until browned, then add the mixed vegetables and cook until tender. Stir in the soy sauce and fish sauce, and serve hot.

title: Red Curry with Beef and Bell Peppers
summary: A spicy and flavorful Thai curry made with beef, bell peppers, and a blend of aromatic spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a pan and sauté the onion and garlic until softened. Add the beef and cook until browned, then add the curry paste and cook for 1 minute. Pour in the coconut milk and simmer until the sauce thickens.

title: Thai Chicken and Rice Bowl
summary: A simple and flavorful Thai dish made with grilled chicken, steamed rice, and a variety of aromatic spices.
instructions: Grill the chicken until cooked through, then slice into thin strips. Steam the rice until tender, then serve with the chicken and a variety of garnishes. Drizzle with fish sauce and lime juice for added flavor.

title: Grilled Shrimp with Peanut Sauce
summary: A simple and flavorful Thai dish made with grilled shrimp, peanut sauce, and a variety of aromatic spices.
instructions: Grill the shrimp until cooked through, then serve with a side of peanut sauce. Garnish with chopped cilantro and toasted peanuts. Serve with steamed rice or noodles for a complete meal.

title: Thai Lamb and Vegetable Skewers
summary: A colorful and flavorful Thai dish made with lamb, mixed vegetables, and a blend of aromatic spices.
instructions: Thread the lamb and vegetables onto skewers and grill until cooked through. Serve with a side of peanut sauce or satay sauce. Garnish with chopped cilantro and toasted peanuts.

title: Thai Beef and Basil Stir-Fry
summary: A quick and easy Thai stir-fry made with beef, basil, and a blend of aromatic spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a pan and sauté the onion and garlic until softened. Add the beef and cook until browned, then add the basil and cook until wilted. Stir in the soy sauce and fish sauce, and serve hot.

title: Chiles Rellenos de Queso
summary: Poblano peppers stuffed with melty cheese, battered, and fried to golden perfection.
instructions: Roast and peel poblano peppers, then stuff with cheese and coat in a light batter. Fry until golden brown and the cheese is melted. Serve immediately with your favorite salsa.

title: Huevos Rancheros
summary: Fried eggs served on lightly fried corn tortillas, topped with a vibrant tomato-salsa.
instructions: Fry corn tortillas lightly, then top each with a fried egg. Spoon warm salsa over the eggs. Garnish with avocado and cilantro if desired.

title: Enfrijoladas
summary: Corn tortillas dipped in a smooth black bean sauce, filled with cheese and topped with crema.
instructions: Soften corn tortillas briefly in warm oil, then dip into warm black bean sauce. Fill with cheese, roll, and place seam-side down on a plate. Top with crema, queso fresco, and cilantro.

title: Sopa de Tortilla
summary: A rich tomato-based broth with crispy tortilla strips, cheese, avocado, and a hint of spice.
instructions: Simmer tomato, onion, garlic, and chili peppers to create a flavorful broth. Fry corn tortilla strips until crisp. Serve the hot broth topped with tortilla strips, cheese, avocado, and cilantro.

title: Tostadas de Tinga de Hongos
summary: Crispy corn tostadas topped with a savory shredded mushroom 'tinga' filling.
instructions: Sauté shredded mushrooms with onion, garlic, and chipotle in adobo sauce until tender. Serve the mushroom mixture generously over crispy corn tostada shells. Garnish with shredded lettuce, avocado, and a drizzle of vegan crema.

title: Enchiladas Verdes con Queso
summary: Corn tortillas filled with cheese, smothered in a tangy green tomatillo sauce and baked.
instructions: Dip corn tortillas in warm tomatillo sauce and fill with cheese, then roll. Place enchiladas seam-side down in a baking dish and cover with more sauce. Bake until heated through and cheese is melted, then top with crema and onion.

title: Quesadillas con Flor de Calabaza
summary: Corn tortillas filled with cheese and delicate squash blossoms, grilled until golden.
instructions: Sauté squash blossoms with onion and garlic until softened. Place a layer of cheese and the squash blossom mixture between two corn tortillas. Grill in a lightly oiled pan until golden brown and cheese is melted.

title: Papas con Chorizo Vegano
summary: Diced potatoes sautéed with crumbled vegan chorizo for a hearty and flavorful side dish.
instructions: Boil or steam diced potatoes until tender, then drain. Crumble and fry vegan chorizo in a pan until browned. Add the cooked potatoes to the pan with the chorizo and sauté until slightly crispy.

title: Tamales Verdes de Rajas
summary: Steamed masa dough filled with roasted poblano strips and cheese, wrapped in corn husks.
instructions: Prepare masa dough with vegetable shortening and baking powder. Sauté roasted poblano strips with onion and garlic, then mix with cheese. Spread masa onto corn husks, add filling, fold, and steam until firm.

title: Rajas con Crema
summary: Roasted poblano pepper strips simmered in a creamy sauce, often served as a side or filling.
instructions: Roast and peel poblano peppers, then slice into strips. Sauté strips with onion and garlic, then simmer in a mixture of crema and broth. Season with salt and pepper, and serve warm.

title: Tacos de Papa y Nopales
summary: Corn tortillas filled with a savory mixture of cooked diced potatoes and tender nopal cactus paddles.
instructions: Boil or steam diced potatoes until tender. Sauté chopped nopal cactus with onion and garlic until tender and any liquid has evaporated. Combine potatoes and nopal mixture, season, and serve in warm corn tortillas with salsa.

title: Pozole Vegano de Hongos
summary: A hearty vegan pozole made with mushrooms and hominy in a rich, spiced broth.
instructions: Simmer hominy, mushrooms, onion, garlic, and chili peppers in vegetable broth until flavors meld. Season the pozole with oregano, cumin, and salt. Serve hot, garnished with shredded cabbage, radish, lime, and oregano.

title: Chicken Shawarma
summary: Marinated chicken is grilled and served in a pita with tahini sauce and vegetables.
instructions: Marinate chicken in a mix of olive oil, lemon juice, and spices for at least 30 minutes. Grill the chicken and serve in pita bread with tahini sauce, onion, and tomato. Add pickled turnips and parsley for extra flavor.

title: Grilled Octopus
summary: Tenderized octopus is marinated and grilled to perfection.
instructions: Tenderize octopus by pounding it with a meat mallet. Marinate octopus in a mix of olive oil, lemon juice, and herbs for at least 30 minutes. Grill the octopus and serve with a side of lemon wedges.

title: Spanish Paella
summary: Savory paella is cooked with chicken, seafood, and saffron-infused rice.
instructions: Cook the rice with saffron and chicken broth. Add chicken, seafood, and spices to the paella pan and cook until the rice is tender. Serve the paella hot, garnished with lemon wedges.

title: Greek Chicken
summary: Marinated chicken is grilled and served with a side of tangy tzatziki sauce.
instructions: Marinate chicken in a mix of olive oil, lemon juice, and herbs for at least 30 minutes. Grill the chicken and serve with a side of tzatziki sauce. Add some crumbled feta cheese for extra flavor.

title: Moroccan Fish
summary: Flaky fish is cooked in a flavorful tagine with preserved lemons and olives.
instructions: Cook the fish in a tagine with preserved lemons, olives, and spices. Add some chopped fresh parsley and cilantro for extra flavor. Serve the fish with a side of couscous.

title: Turkish Doner
summary: Thinly sliced lamb is stacked and cooked on a vertical spit, served in a pita with vegetables.
instructions: Stack the lamb slices on a vertical spit and cook until crispy. Serve the doner in a pita with vegetables and tahini sauce. Add some pickled turnips and parsley for extra flavor.

title: Levantine Lamb Kofta
summary: Tender lamb kofta is grilled and served with a side of creamy tzatziki sauce.
instructions: Mix the lamb with spices and herbs, and shape into kofta. Grill the kofta until cooked through, and serve with tzatziki sauce. Add some crumbled feta cheese for extra flavor.

title: Cyprus Grilled Chicken
summary: Marinated chicken is grilled and served with a side of creamy hummus.
instructions: Marinate chicken in a mix of olive oil, lemon juice, and herbs for at least 30 minutes. Grill the chicken and serve with a side of hummus. Add some chopped fresh parsley and cilantro for extra flavor.

title: Albanian Meatballs
summary: Tender meatballs are cooked in a flavorful broth with vegetables and served with crusty bread.
instructions: Mix the beef with spices and herbs, and shape into meatballs. Cook the meatballs in a flavorful broth with vegetables. Serve the meatballs with crusty bread and a side salad.

title: Croatian Sausages
summary: Spicy sausages are grilled and served with a side of crusty bread and peppers.
instructions: Grill the sausages until cooked through. Serve the sausages with crusty bread and a side of peppers. Add some chopped fresh parsley and cilantro for extra flavor.

title: Bosnian Cevapi
summary: Tender minced meat is shaped into cevapi and grilled, served with a side of flatbread and onions.
instructions: Mix the beef with spices and herbs, and shape into cevapi. Grill the cevapi until cooked through, and serve with flatbread and onions. Add some chopped fresh parsley and cilantro for extra flavor.

title: German Potato Dumplings (Kartoffelklöße)
summary: Hearty and tender dumplings made from cooked potatoes, perfect as a side dish.
instructions: Boil potatoes until tender, then mash them thoroughly. Mix in flour, egg, and salt, forming a dough. Shape into balls and boil until they float to the surface.

title: Vegetarian Swedish Meatballs
summary: Plant-based meatballs in a creamy, savory sauce, a vegetarian take on a classic.
instructions: Combine breadcrumbs, mashed beans, onion, and spices to form balls; pan-fry until golden. For the sauce, sauté onions, add broth, plant-based cream, and seasonings, then simmer.

title: Italian Vegetable Frittata
summary: A versatile baked omelet packed with colorful vegetables and cheese.
instructions: Sauté mixed vegetables in an oven-safe skillet until tender. Whisk eggs with milk, cheese, and seasonings, then pour over the vegetables. Bake until set.

title: Greek Spinach and Feta Pie (Spanakopita)
summary: Flaky phyllo dough filled with a savory mixture of spinach, feta cheese, and herbs.
instructions: Sauté spinach with onions and herbs, then mix with crumbled feta cheese. Layer phyllo dough with butter or oil and the spinach filling. Bake until golden brown.

title: Spanish Garlic Potatoes (Patatas Bravas)
summary: Crispy fried potato cubes served with a spicy tomato sauce and aioli.
instructions: Cut potatoes into cubes and fry until golden and crisp. Prepare a spicy tomato sauce and a garlic aioli. Toss potatoes with sauces before serving.

title: Swiss Cheese Fondue
summary: A communal pot of melted cheese, perfect for dipping bread and vegetables.
instructions: Melt Gruyère and Emmental cheese in a pot with white wine and kirsch. Stir in cornstarch to thicken and season with pepper and nutmeg. Serve hot with bread cubes.

title: Vegan Austrian Apple Strudel
summary: A classic dessert with thinly sliced apples, cinnamon, and raisins wrapped in delicate pastry.
instructions: Toss thinly sliced apples with sugar, cinnamon, and raisins. Brush phyllo dough sheets with oil, layer them, spread the apple filling, and roll up. Bake until golden and crisp.

title: German Red Cabbage with Apples (Rotkohl)
summary: Sweet and sour braised red cabbage, a traditional side dish for festive meals.
instructions: Shred red cabbage and apples; sauté with onions in oil until softened. Add vinegar, broth, sugar, and spices, then simmer until tender. Stir in a little jam before serving.

title: Italian Polenta with Mushrooms
summary: Creamy polenta topped with a rich sauté of mixed mushrooms and herbs.
instructions: Cook polenta according to package directions until creamy. Sauté mixed mushrooms with garlic and herbs in butter or oil until tender. Serve mushrooms over hot polenta.

title: French Ratatouille
summary: A vibrant Provençal vegetable stew featuring eggplant, zucchini, tomatoes, and peppers.
instructions: Sauté onions and garlic, then add diced eggplant, zucchini, bell peppers, and tomatoes. Season with herbs de Provence and simmer until vegetables are tender.

title: German Sausage and Sauerkraut
summary: A hearty and flavorful combination of seasoned sausages served with tangy sauerkraut.
instructions: Cook bratwurst or other German sausages according to package directions. Heat sauerkraut with a little broth or water until warm. Serve sausages alongside sauerkraut.

title: Creole Shrimp and Grits
summary: Tender shrimp simmered in a savory Creole sauce served over creamy grits.
instructions: Cook grits according to package directions until creamy. Sauté shrimp with garlic, onion, bell pepper, and tomatoes in a skillet with Creole seasoning. Serve sautéed shrimp mixture over the prepared grits.

title: Apple Pie
summary: A classic American dessert with a flaky crust filled with tender, spiced apples.
instructions: Prepare a double pie crust and line a pie plate. Mix sliced apples with sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, and a thickener like flour or cornstarch. Pour apple filling into the crust, cover with the top crust, crimp edges, and bake until golden brown and bubbly.

title: Crab Cakes
summary: Savory cakes made from lump crab meat, seasoned and pan-fried to golden perfection.
instructions: Gently mix lump crab meat with mayonnaise, Dijon mustard, Worcestershire sauce, Old Bay seasoning, and breadcrumbs. Form the mixture into patties and chill for at least 30 minutes. Pan-fry the crab cakes in butter or oil until golden brown and heated through.

title: Georgia Pulled Pork
summary: Slow-cooked pork shoulder, pulled and coated in a tangy vinegar-based barbecue sauce.
instructions: Rub a pork shoulder with spices and slow-cook until fork-tender. Shred the pork and toss with a classic Georgia vinegar-based BBQ sauce. Serve warm, often on buns.

title: Mississippi Mud Pie
summary: A rich chocolate dessert with a cookie crust, gooey filling, and chocolate frosting.
instructions: Create a crust by mixing crushed chocolate cookies with melted butter and pressing into a pie plate. Prepare a filling by combining butter, sugar, eggs, cocoa powder, and vanilla, then pour into the crust. Bake until the filling is set, then frost with a chocolate frosting and chill.

title: Pork Chops with Applesauce
summary: Pan-seared pork chops served with a side of sweet and tart applesauce.
instructions: Season thick-cut pork chops with salt and pepper and pan-sear in butter until golden brown and cooked through. Serve the pork chops immediately with a generous portion of applesauce. Optional: Deglaze the pan with a splash of apple cider or white wine for a simple pan sauce.

title: Rocky Road Ice Cream
summary: A classic ice cream flavor loaded with chocolate, marshmallows, and nuts.
instructions: Prepare a chocolate ice cream base by combining cream, milk, sugar, cocoa powder, and vanilla, then churning. Before the ice cream is fully frozen, fold in chopped nuts (like almonds or peanuts) and mini marshmallows. Freeze until firm.

title: Sloppy Joes
summary: A simple and flavorful ground beef mixture simmered in a sweet and tangy tomato-based sauce, served on buns.
instructions: Brown ground beef with chopped onion and garlic in a skillet. Drain excess fat, then stir in ketchup, Worcestershire sauce, mustard, brown sugar, and seasonings. Simmer the mixture for at least 15 minutes until thickened, then serve on hamburger buns.

title: Southern Fried Catfish
summary: Cornmeal-crusted catfish fillets, deep-fried until crispy and golden brown.
instructions: Dredge catfish fillets in a seasoned cornmeal mixture. Fry the coated fillets in hot oil until golden brown and cooked through. Drain on paper towels and serve immediately.

title: Texas-Style Brisket
summary: Beef brisket slow-smoked with a simple rub of salt and pepper until tender and juicy.
instructions: Generously season a beef brisket with coarse salt and black pepper. Smoke the brisket at a low temperature for several hours until it reaches an internal temperature of 95°C. Rest the brisket for at least 30 minutes before slicing against the grain.

title: Turkey Pot Pie
summary: A comforting classic featuring tender turkey and vegetables in a creamy sauce, topped with a flaky crust.
instructions: Sauté vegetables like carrots, celery, and peas in butter, then stir in flour to make a roux. Gradually whisk in chicken broth and milk to create a creamy sauce, then add cooked turkey and seasonings. Pour the filling into a pie dish, top with a pastry crust, and bake until golden brown.

title: Dal Makhani
summary: A rich and creamy lentil dish slow-cooked with spices, butter, and cream.
instructions: Rinse lentils and beans, then simmer with water and salt until very tender. Mash some lentils and add butter, cream, and spices, simmering until thickened.

title: Palak Paneer
summary: A vibrant dish featuring soft paneer cheese in a spiced spinach gravy.
instructions: Blanch and puree spinach, then sauté aromatics and spices before adding spinach puree and paneer. Simmer briefly until paneer is heated through.

title: Vegetable Biryani
summary: Fragrant basmati rice layered with mixed vegetables and aromatic spices, slow-cooked to perfection.
instructions: Par-cook rice and sauté mixed vegetables with whole spices and ground spices. Layer rice and vegetables in a pot, cover and steam until rice is fluffy and vegetables are tender.

title: Bhindi Masala
summary: Tender okra pieces sautéed with onions, tomatoes, and a blend of Indian spices.
instructions: Fry okra until lightly browned and set aside. Sauté onions, ginger, garlic, tomatoes, and spices, then add okra and cook until tender.

title: Paneer Butter Masala
summary: A popular dish with soft paneer cubes in a rich, creamy, and mildly spiced tomato gravy.
instructions: Simmer tomatoes, onions, cashews, and spices until soft, then puree into a smooth sauce. Add butter, cream, paneer, and simmer briefly.

title: Malai Kofta
summary: Deep-fried potato and paneer dumplings served in a rich, creamy, and mildly sweet tomato-based gravy.
instructions: Mash potatoes and paneer, form into balls with filling, and deep-fry until golden. Simmer a tomato-based sauce with cream and spices, then add koftas.

title: Punjabi Kadhi Pakora
summary: A tangy yogurt-based curry served with gram flour fritters (pakoras).
instructions: Whisk yogurt and gram flour, then simmer with water and tempering spices. Prepare pakoras by frying gram flour batter, then add them to the simmering kadhi.

title: Baingan Bharta
summary: Smoky roasted eggplant mashed and cooked with onions, tomatoes, and spices.
instructions: Roast eggplant until charred and soft, then scoop out the flesh and mash it. Sauté onions, tomatoes, ginger, garlic, and spices, then add eggplant and simmer.

title: Masoor Dal Tadka
summary: Red lentils simmered until tender and finished with a flavorful tempering of spices and aromatics.
instructions: Boil red lentils with turmeric and salt until soft. In a separate pan, heat ghee or oil and sauté mustard seeds, cumin seeds, garlic, ginger, and chilies for the tadka, then pour over the lentils.

title: Pav Bhaji
summary: A popular street food dish featuring a spicy mashed vegetable curry served with soft buttered rolls.
instructions: Boil and mash mixed vegetables with spices. Sauté onions, tomatoes, ginger, garlic, and pav bhaji masala, then add mashed vegetables and simmer. Serve with buttered pav rolls.

title: Tagliatelle Bolognese
summary: A classic rich meat sauce simmered with tomatoes and herbs, served over fresh tagliatelle pasta.
instructions: Brown ground beef and pork with diced onion and carrot. Stir in crushed tomatoes and simmer for at least 1 hour. Serve over cooked tagliatelle.

title: Risotto ai Funghi
summary: Creamy Arborio rice cooked slowly with mushrooms, white wine, and Parmesan cheese.
instructions: Sauté Arborio rice with shallots. Gradually add warm chicken broth, stirring constantly, until creamy. Stir in sautéed mushrooms and Parmesan cheese.

title: Lasagne alla Bolognese
summary: Layers of pasta, rich meat sauce, béchamel sauce, and cheese baked until golden and bubbly.
instructions: Prepare Bolognese sauce and béchamel sauce. Layer pasta sheets with sauces and cheese. Bake until golden brown and bubbly.

title: Margherita Pizza
summary: A classic Neapolitan pizza with San Marzano tomatoes, fresh mozzarella, basil, and olive oil.
instructions: Top pizza dough with tomato sauce, mozzarella, and basil leaves. Bake at high heat until crust is golden and cheese is melted.

title: Pork Osso Buco
summary: Tender pork shanks braised in a savory broth with vegetables and herbs.
instructions: Sear pork shanks until browned. Sauté mirepoix (onion, carrot, celery), then add wine and broth. Braise shanks until fork-tender.

title: Scaloppine al Limone
summary: Thinly sliced veal or chicken cutlets pan-fried and finished in a bright lemon-butter sauce.
instructions: Dredge veal cutlets in flour and pan-fry until golden. Remove cutlets and make a sauce with butter, lemon juice, and broth. Return cutlets to sauce to warm.

title: Penne Arrabbiata
summary: Penne pasta in a spicy tomato sauce with garlic and red chili flakes.
instructions: Sauté garlic and red chili flakes in olive oil. Add crushed tomatoes and simmer. Toss with cooked penne pasta.

title: Stir-Fried Bok Choy with Garlic
summary: Quick and easy stir-fry made with bok choy, garlic, and soy sauce, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok over medium-high heat, add garlic and stir-fry until fragrant. Add bok choy and stir-fry until tender. Season with soy sauce to taste.

title: Vegan Kung Pao Tofu
summary: Spicy and numbing stir-fry made with tofu, peanuts, and vegetables, served over steamed rice.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok over medium-high heat, add tofu and stir-fry until golden. Add peanuts, vegetables, and chili peppers, and stir-fry until combined. Season with soy sauce and serve over rice.

title: Braised Mushrooms with Bok Choy
summary: Hearty and flavorful braise made with mushrooms, bok choy, and soy sauce, served over steamed rice.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok over medium heat, add mushrooms and braise until tender. Add bok choy and soy sauce, and braise until combined. Serve over rice.

title: Stir-Fried Eggplant with Garlic
summary: Quick and easy stir-fry made with eggplant, garlic, and soy sauce, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok over medium-high heat, add garlic and stir-fry until fragrant. Add eggplant and stir-fry until tender. Season with soy sauce to taste.

title: Vegan Wonton Soup
summary: Comforting and delicious soup made with wontons, vegetables, and soy sauce, served over steamed rice.
instructions: Heat oil in a pot over medium heat, add wontons and cook until tender. Add vegetables and soy sauce, and simmer until combined. Serve over rice.

title: Stir-Fried Cabbage with Carrots
summary: Quick and easy stir-fry made with cabbage, carrots, and soy sauce, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok over medium-high heat, add carrots and stir-fry until tender. Add cabbage and stir-fry until combined. Season with soy sauce to taste.

title: Stir-Fried Broccoli with Garlic
summary: Quick and easy stir-fry made with broccoli, garlic, and soy sauce, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok over medium-high heat, add garlic and stir-fry until fragrant. Add broccoli and stir-fry until tender. Season with soy sauce to taste.

title: Braised Lotus Root with Mushrooms
summary: Hearty and flavorful braise made with lotus root, mushrooms, and soy sauce, served over steamed rice.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok over medium heat, add lotus root and braise until tender. Add mushrooms and soy sauce, and braise until combined. Serve over rice.

title: Stir-Fried Spinach with Garlic
summary: Quick and easy stir-fry made with spinach, garlic, and soy sauce, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok over medium-high heat, add garlic and stir-fry until fragrant. Add spinach and stir-fry until wilted. Season with soy sauce to taste.

title: Vegan Vegetable Lo Mein
summary: Hearty and flavorful noodle dish made with vegetables and soy sauce, served over lo mein noodles.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok over medium-high heat, add vegetables and stir-fry until tender. Add lo mein noodles and soy sauce, and stir-fry until combined. Serve hot.

title: Thai Green Curry Prawns
summary: Succulent prawns simmered in a fragrant and spicy green curry sauce with coconut milk and Thai basil.
instructions: Sauté green curry paste in oil until fragrant. Add coconut milk, prawns, bamboo shoots, and fish sauce; simmer until prawns are cooked. Stir in Thai basil and serve hot with rice.

title: Pad Thai Chicken
summary: A classic stir-fried rice noodle dish with tender chicken, egg, bean sprouts, and a tangy tamarind sauce.
instructions: Soak rice noodles, then stir-fry them with chicken, egg, and tofu in a hot wok. Add bean sprouts, garlic chives, peanuts, and Pad Thai sauce; toss to combine. Serve immediately with lime wedges.

title: Tom Yum Goong (Spicy Shrimp Soup)
summary: A hot and sour Thai soup bursting with the flavors of lemongrass, galangal, kaffir lime leaves, and plump shrimp.
instructions: Simmer chicken broth with lemongrass, galangal, kaffir lime leaves, and chilies. Add mushrooms and shrimp; cook until shrimp turn pink. Stir in fish sauce, lime juice, and cilantro; serve immediately.

title: Gaeng Keow Wan Gai (Green Curry Chicken)
summary: A rich and aromatic green curry with tender chicken pieces simmered in coconut milk with Thai eggplant and bamboo shoots.
instructions: Heat coconut cream and green curry paste until oil separates. Add chicken pieces, coconut milk, fish sauce, and sugar; simmer until chicken is cooked. Stir in Thai eggplant, bamboo shoots, and Thai basil; cook for a few more minutes.

title: Laab Moo (Minced Pork Salad)
summary: A spicy and savory minced pork salad flavored with lime juice, fish sauce, chili flakes, mint, and toasted rice powder.
instructions: Cook minced pork until no longer pink, drain excess liquid. Mix pork with lime juice, fish sauce, chili flakes, shallots, mint, cilantro, and toasted rice powder. Serve immediately, often with sticky rice and fresh vegetables.

title: Pad See Ew Pork
summary: Wide rice noodles stir-fried with pork, Chinese broccoli, and egg in a savory dark soy sauce mixture.
instructions: Stir-fry marinated pork until cooked, then push to the side of the wok. Add egg and scrambled it, then add wide rice noodles and Chinese broccoli. Pour over sauce mixture (soy sauce, dark soy sauce, oyster sauce, sugar) and stir-fry until noodles are tender and slightly charred.

title: Gaeng Daeng Neua (Red Curry Beef)
summary: Tender slices of beef simmered in a vibrant red curry sauce made with coconut milk, bamboo shoots, and bell peppers.
instructions: Heat coconut cream and red curry paste until oil separates. Add beef slices and cook until browned. Pour in coconut milk, add fish sauce, sugar, bamboo shoots, and bell peppers; simmer until beef is tender and vegetables are cooked.

title: Pla Neung Manao (Steamed Fish with Lime)
summary: Whole fish delicately steamed and bathed in a zesty broth of lime juice, garlic, and chili.
instructions: Steam the whole fish until cooked through. While steaming, mix lime juice, garlic, chilies, fish sauce, and sugar in a small pot and heat gently. Pour the lime-chili sauce over the steamed fish and garnish with cilantro and celery.

title: Khao Pad Gai (Chicken Fried Rice)
summary: A simple and satisfying Thai-style fried rice packed with tender chicken pieces, egg, and vegetables.
instructions: Stir-fry chicken and garlic in oil until cooked. Add cooked rice, egg, and vegetables; stir-fry until heated through. Season with soy sauce, fish sauce, and sugar; serve immediately.

title: Gaeng Pa Pla (Jungle Curry Fish)
summary: A spicy and watery 'jungle curry' without coconut milk, featuring fish, Thai eggplant, and vibrant herbs.
instructions: Stir-fry jungle curry paste in oil until fragrant. Add fish pieces and stir-fry briefly, then add water or stock. Add Thai eggplant, bamboo shoots, long beans, and seasonings; simmer until fish is cooked and vegetables are tender.

title: Moo Ping (Grilled Pork Skewers)
summary: Marinated pork skewers grilled to perfection, offering a sweet, savory, and slightly smoky flavor.
instructions: Marinate thinly sliced pork in a mixture of soy sauce, oyster sauce, fish sauce, sugar, garlic, and pepper. Thread pork onto skewers. Grill skewers over medium-high heat until cooked through and slightly caramelized.

title: Stuffed Peppers with Vegetables
summary: A flavorful Mexican dish filled with sautéed vegetables, served in roasted poblano peppers.
instructions: Roast poblano peppers over an open flame, then remove the skin and fill with sautéed vegetables. Place stuffed peppers in a baking dish and bake until heated through.

title: Black Bean Sopes

summary: Hearty Italian dish made with beef, mushrooms, and creamy polenta.
